ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the team plays */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the team is active in */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoff, Championship) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed */,
  "point_difference" INTEGER /* Point difference */,
  "games_not_played" INTEGER /* Number of games not played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the opponent team plays */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the opponent team is active in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponents_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rivalries" (
  "rivalry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rivalry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "rivalry_name" TEXT /* Name of the rivalry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rivalry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rivalries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rivalries_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_details" (
  "game_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game detail */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter number */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_details_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_logs" (
  "player_game_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
